columns.name: BETBET
columns.description: Code indicating the type of transaction or agreement

columns.name: TIL_DATO
columns.description: End date of the agreement or transaction

columns.name: KOMMENTAR
columns.description: Additional comments or notes related to the agreement

columns.description: Timestamp of when the record was created or last updated
